# 🎯 DSA Question Solutions (Auto-Generated)

✨ Solutions for **97/101** days of DSA curriculum.

## 📁 Structure
```
DSA-question/
├── DAY_01/ to DAY_80/
│   ├── Q1/ and Q2/
│   │   ├── problem.txt      # Problem statement
│   │   ├── solution.c       # C code solution
│   │   ├── explanation.md   # Approach & complexity
│   │   └── metadata.json    # Generation details
```

## 🚀 Quick Start
```bash
cd DSA-question/DAY_01/Q1
gcc solution.c -o solution && ./solution < input.txt
```

## ⚙️ Configuration
- **Models**: `openai/gpt-oss-20b:free, google/gemma-4-31b-it:free, qwen/qwen3-coder:free`
- **Language**: `C`

- **Success Rate**: 97/101 days
